chatgpt.citationContext: ChatGPT Free returns Kirchner at #3 on 'Best electrician in Cypress, TX?' query; also mentioned on 'Panel upgrade 200 amp Cypress?' and 'Most-reviewed electrician Cypress 4.9 star?' queries. ChatGPT Plus does not cite Kirchner across the full test set.

claude.citationContext: Claude returns Kirchner at #6 on 'Best electrician in Cypress, TX?' query; also listed in set on 'Most-reviewed electrician Cypress 4.9 star?' query.

gemini.citationContext: Kirchner does not surface on Gemini across the full test set.

perplexity.citationContext: Kirchner does not surface on Perplexity across the full test set.

copilot.citationContext: Microsoft Copilot returns Kirchner Top 3 on 'Best electrician in Cypress, TX?' and 'Most-reviewed electrician Cypress 4.9 star?' queries; mentioned in passing on 'Emergency electrician Cypress 24/7?' query.

aeo.notes: 1 out of 10. Answer Engine Optimization — featured snippets, 'people also ask,' voice-assistant answers. Missing schema starves AEO surfaces.

geo.notes: 3 out of 10. Generative Engine Optimization — ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity citation depth. Thin content authority limits GEO surfacing.

aiSeo.notes: 1 out of 10. Search Generative Experience — Google AI Overviews, Bing AI surfaces. Missing schema starves AI SEO surfaces.

llmSeo.notes: 3 out of 10. LLM training-data citation footprint — Wikipedia, Crunchbase, BBB, Yelp authority signals. Fragmented citations (25 of 37 inconsistent directory citations) and three brand domains splitting authority signals starve LLM SEO.
